rationale: Thread-safety bug in in_request() tracking; internal concurrency issue, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Case mismatch bug in internal option name passing; implementation bug, not a spec-defined behavior deviation.
Incorrect reauthentication logic for admin DB access; no specific auth spec rule cited, predates modern auth spec.
Forward-compatibility improvement to accept new index types; no spec deviation, proactive feature support.
URI read_preference validation fix with thin description; insufficient detail to confirm spec rule violated.
Policy change to disallow multiple authentications per client; design decision, not a spec requirement.
Unpin member when read preference changes; thin description, insufficient detail to confirm spec rule violated.
Test code ignores DB_PORT env var; test infrastructure bug unrelated to driver spec behavior.
Database object not cached per name; API ergonomics/implementation issue, no spec rule involved.
Adding index type constants for new MongoDB 2.4 index types; feature addition, not a spec conformance fix.
SSL cert error swallowed and surfaced as AutoReconnect; internal error-handling bug, no spec rule defines this behavior.
MongoClient ignores read preference; spec requires honoring readPreference on all client types.
Collection name 'connection' conflicts with Python attribute; Python-specific API naming collision, no spec rule violated.
Socket hangs indefinitely on recv; network/timeout implementation bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Improvement to expose lastErrorObject from findAndModify; feature enhancement, not a spec conformance fix.
write_concern.update() on collection not honored; internal API bug, not a spec-defined wire-protocol deviation.
Docs wrongly imply cursor default is notimeout; documentation bug only.
json_util supports limited regex flags and crashes on missing $options; bson-adjacent but no specific BSON spec rule cited.
Connection leak in Python 2.7.0 due to threadlocal bug; implementation bug, no spec rule involved.
find_and_modify raises OperationFailure instead of DuplicateKeyError; error-type mapping, no specific CRUD spec rule names this requirement.
MongoClient __socket() always returns master ignoring SECONDARY read preference; violates server selection spec.
_connect=False ignored when auth credentials present; internal initialization ordering bug, not a spec rule violation.
KeyError in __find_primary when primary removed; internal race condition/implementation bug, no specific SDAM rule contradicted.
AttributeError on None monitor after network error; internal state management bug, no SDAM spec rule contradicted.
max_pool_size limits idle sockets not total connections; pre-CMAP spec, mentions Java as comparison but not as explicit divergence.
CVE in embedded ssl_match_hostname.py; security dependency bug, no spec area involved.
Test suite failure due to mongod bind failure in CI environment; build/CI infrastructure issue.
Request to validate update dict has no modifier on upsert; improvement request, no spec rule requires this validation.
NULL pointer dereference in C extension DBRef parsing when $id missing; implementation memory safety bug, not a spec deviation.
network_timeout ignored by commands and not validated; documentation clarification request, no spec rule involved.
authenticate() docstring outdated after role-based auth introduction; documentation bug only.
TypeError when string passed for cache_for in _cache_index; input validation bug, no spec area involved.
Wrong error type raised on lazy auth failure; internal exception-mapping bug, no auth spec rule defines this.
API improvement to get Database from URI; feature request, CDRIVER-632 related link is coordination not divergence.
wait_queue_timeout documented as ms but implemented as seconds; internal parameter bug in unreleased code, not a spec rule.
insert with manipulate=False returns [None] instead of None; API return-value bug, no spec rule defines insert return value precisely.
AttributeError in alive() when primary is None; internal null-check bug, no spec rule involved.
Semaphore leak when broken request socket replaced; internal pool implementation bug, no CMAP spec rule contradicted.
DeprecationWarning from gevent module rename; dependency compatibility issue, no spec area.
DRIVERS-1 required batch insert splitting by maxMessageSizeBytes; links RUBY-533 as related cross-driver work.
add_option/remove_option don't sync internal instance variables; internal API consistency bug, no spec rule contradicted.
User inserted string _id then queries with ObjectId; type mismatch is expected MongoDB behavior, not a driver bug.
readPreferenceTags and uuidRepresentation URI options not supported per connection string spec.
Memory grows during repeated inserts; performance/memory bug, no spec rule involved.
TypeError when max_pool_size=None in Python 3; implementation type-check bug, no spec rule involved.
ImportError on Python 3.3 due to missing codec module; packaging/install bug, no spec area.
C extension RuntimeWarning in mod_wsgi; deployment/packaging issue, no spec area.
Semaphore not released on connection failure causing thread hang; implementation bug, no specific CMAP spec rule contradicted.
waitQueueMultiple and waitQueueTimeoutMS URI options not honored in MongoReplicaSetClient; spec-required options ignored.
AttributeError on Pool.__del__ when gevent missing; internal cleanup bug on misconfiguration, no spec rule involved.
